programme.title: Anak Angkat Durhaka
programme.desc: Hartanto and Dahlia already have a daughter named Putri. Hartanto has long wanted another child, preferably a boy, but after several miscarriages, the doctor forbids Dahlia from getting pregnant again. Dahlia asks Hartanto to be patient, after all, they already have Putri. After careful consideration, they decide to adopt Bagas from an orphanage through official adoption. For several years, the Hartanto family is very happy with Bagas’s presence.

programme.title: AKSI ASIA 2024 - EP 9
programme.desc: 24 ustaz and ustazah from 6 Asian countries-Brunei Darussalam, Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Thailand, and Timor Leste-take the stage to compete, showcasing a variety of meaningful Islamic activities and entertainment. programme.title: Terbangun Dari Mati Suri
programme.desc: The married couple Firman (Andrew Andhika) and Siska (Sarah Samantha), known as gold store burglars, attempt another heist that afternoon. However, their crime fails completely when a new store visitor notices them. Firman and his accomplices flee to save themselves and scatter. Firman runs toward his motorcycle and accidentally hits a child, Nina (Najla), who had just left the store with her mother. Firman almost yells at Nina, but Siska quickly grabs his hand and drags him away.

programme.title: Maling Hati Malah Kena Ulti
programme.desc: The driver, Trisno (Ridho Illahi), is shocked by Fafa’s (Djihan Ranti) behavior. Instead of apologizing for her mistake, Fafa blames Trisno. Some time later, Fafa and Trisno meet again. Fafa finally learns that Trisno is the man who tends her mother’s goats. On top of that, Fafa refuses when her mother tries to match her with Trisno, which makes Trisno sad. Fafa says she doesn’t like Trisno, the goat keeper, and even adds that she hates Trisno’s body odor, which smells like goats.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih (Carmela van der Kruk) always knows how to handle the horses at Burhan's (Dimas Jati) ranch, Sandra's (Indah Nic) father. Bimo (Naufal Samudra) comes to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which is riding and caring for horses. As soon as he gets on the horse, Bimo falls off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn had nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 114
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) doesn't accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea was told by someone that Bryan's travel business was a fraud. Because of Dhea, Bryan lost money and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work in Bryan's travel business for 2 weeks.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 568
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 62
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan (Dimaz Andrean) accidentally damaged Ajeng's (Yunita Siregar) bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart, and a child ate Acan's bakpao without paying. Angry, Acan left Ajeng and took his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno (Edwin Syarief), who was to be her match, was already there.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 114

programme.title: Susah Banget Dah Memadamkan Api Cinta
programme.desc: Bimo (Ridho Ilahi) is a chef and restaurant owner who was saved by Luna (Shanice Margaretha) due to a fire. Bimo has just broken up with Indah because he is too focused on thinking about his restaurant. Bimo also tries to get close to Luna, the firefighter who saved his life.

programme.title: MY BEAUTIFUL (EX) SISTER
programme.desc: Juna (Rizky Alatas) and his brother and father (Tenno Ali) were involved in an accident that killed Juna's brother. At the time, it was supposed to be his brother's happy day as he planned to propose to Karin (Kharisma Adzana). Upon hearing the news of her boyfriend's death, Karin was deeply saddened. She seemed to have lost all will to live. The father, who had already considered Karin as his own daughter, asked Juna to take his brother's place and marry Karin.

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Saya Kan Cuma Ikan, Mana Saya Tau Isi Hatimu
programme.desc: Adit (Ridwan Ghany) is a spoiled child who always depends on his father's money. One day his father goes bankrupt and wants to open a catfish restaurant with his friend. However, because Adit doesn't like catfish, Nuri (Syahnaz Sadiqah) and Babe Rojak have to be extra patient in teaching Adit catfish cultivation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 569
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 63
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.desc: No one believes that something that happens to us can actually be a blessing. That's what happened to Selamet (Dimas Aditya), a cleaning man at the office who was promoted to become a trusted aide to Rendra (Denny Martin), the boss.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 569
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 63
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih (Carmela van der Kruk) always knows how to handle the horses at Burhan's (Dimas Jati) ranch, Sandra's (Indah Nic) father. Bimo (Naufal Samudra) comes to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which is riding and caring for horses. As soon as he gets on the horse, Bimo falls off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn had nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 115
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kejar Hatimu Sampai Ke Korea
programme.desc: Bryan (Kiki Farrel) doesn't accept being accused of fraud by Dhea (Ina Marika) because Dhea was told by someone that Bryan's travel business was a fraud. Because of Dhea, Bryan lost money and many clients canceled their trips. As compensation, Dhea had to work in Bryan's travel business for 2 weeks.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 569
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan (Dimaz Andrean) accidentally damaged Ajeng's (Yunita Siregar) bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart, and a child ate Acan's bakpao without paying. Angry, Acan left Ajeng and took his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno (Edwin Syarief), who was to be her match, was already there.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 64
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: I LOVE YOU SAMPE KLEPEK KLEPEK
programme.desc: Vania (Michelle Ziudth) has asthma and has an older sister named Tasya (Claudy Putri). Vania is annoyed with Tasya, who always interferes with her life.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 116
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Rekayasa Cinta Dokter Cantik No Play Play
programme.desc: Angel (Zoe Abbas), who is constantly pressured by her mother to get married, finally takes the practical route by claiming to be the lover of her patient who suffers from amnesia. Angel's two best friends don't agree with her idea, but they end up supporting her. Angel says she will soon marry the man whose real name is Marcel (Bryan McKenzie) because Angel claims to be Marcel's fiancée before Marcel has amnesia.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 570
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 18

programme.title: Skrin Komedia: Tuyul Ke London - EP 2
programme.desc: Drama komedi tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: Pecah Perut - EP 10

programme.title: Perempuan Paling Bahagia - EP 9

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 8
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh - EP 8
programme.desc: Alkisah di kerajaan Kayajaya, seorang gadis kampung yang baik hati menyedari bahawa dia adalah pewaris takhta yang sah dan mesti segera mempelajari adat-istiadat untuk menjadi seorang permaisuri.

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 5
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now In Tokyo - EP 7
programme.desc: Buka Kedai: Now in Tokyo menampilkan 4 selebriti Malaysia yang terdiri daripada Nabila Huda, Shashic, Leona dan Eric. Mereka bakal melakukan misi berniaga di Tokyo, Jepun.

programme.title: Misi Lawak Superstar - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti komedi yang menampilkan juara Muzikal Lawak Superstar 5, Nanas bergandingan dengan barisan pelawak dan selebriti.

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan komedi untun tontonan semua.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah - EP 38
programme.desc: Kehilangan Munirah mengejutkan Syawal dan keluarga mereka. Syawal cuba mencari Munirah yang disangka merajuk. Jannah mengambil peluang untuk menjaga Puan Sri Rafidah yang sakit.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 14
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 3
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 15
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops - EP 3
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 11
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Mat Bond Malaya
programme.desc: Dalam komedi romantik gelap ini, seorang lelaki biasa yang mengimpikan untuk menjadi ejen rahsia ditugaskan mencari penawar bagi virus zombi.

programme.title: Sesat - EP 1
programme.desc: Sesat, rancangan yang menguji minda dan ikhtiar hidup selebriti tempatan dalam mencari destinasi yang ditetapkan.

programme.title: 3xtra0rdinary Love - EP 9
programme.desc: Pelbagai rancangan di mana terdapat permainan dan rancangan bual bicara dengan selebriti

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 21
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: Raja Pantun - EP 11
programme.desc: Pantun pembuka bicara, dihoskan oleh Raja Azura. Dua kumpulan selebriti bertanding, masing masing menunjukkan taring.

programme.title: JMT - EP 13
programme.desc: Saksikan Michael Ang membawa artis pilihan bersama peminat setianya menjejaki makanan unik dan menyediakan semula hidangan tersebut dengan sentuhan cita rasa tempatan

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah - EP 38
programme.desc: Kehilangan Munirah mengejutkan Syawal dan keluarga mereka. Syawal cuba mencari Munirah yang disangka merajuk. Jannah mengambil peluang untuk menjaga Puan Sri Rafidah yang sakit.

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 3
programme.desc: Nadia mendapat imbasan masa silam mengenai keguguran anak dia dan Jessie dihantui oleh gadis bermata merah. Jessie dan Shah bertekar pasal business. Daya mendapat satu kejutan yang mengerunkan.

programme.title: 1 Hari Bersama Idola - EP 11
programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat peminat-peminat yang bertuah menerima kejutan dari selebriti kegemaran mereka.

programme.title: Gadis EXXtra - Saiz Bukan Ukuran - EP 6
programme.desc: Gadis EXXtra sebuah drama komedi tentang kehidupan tiga orang gadis, Nina, Irwinda dan Sahira yang baru saja mendapatkan ijazah tetapi terpaksa berdepan pelbagai masalah sebelum berjaya.

programme.title: Teroka Lokal - EP 3
programme.desc: Teroka Lokal adalah program travelog dengan hos selebriti yang akan mengembara untuk mencari tempat-tempat tersembunyi yang menarik di Malaysia.

programme.desc: Hubungan Jannah dan Puan Sri Rafidah semakin baik. Rasa terganggu dengan perubahan Zakri, Jannah berjumpa dengan Zarina dan memintanya untuk menasihati Zakri.

programme.title: expeRIAnce:Fantasy Escape - EP 7
programme.desc: Sebuah program yang merealisasikan impian peminat bertuah untuk melakukan aktiviti yang mereka gemari bersama selebriti pilihan mereka yang turut berkongsi pengalaman dan memberi motivasi.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Action! - EP 3
programme.desc: Meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal.

programme.title: Dosa - EP 5

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 4
programme.desc: Selepas bergaduh, Jessie lari masuk ke hutan diikuti Shah dan rakan-rakan yang lain. Akhirnya Shah menjumpai Jessie tapi mereka terpisah dari lain. Di dalam hutan kelihatan seorang sedang memerhati mereka.

programme.title: Seandainya Kau Ada
programme.desc: Pasangan kekasih berpisah tatkala lelaki yang dikasihi pergi melanjutkan pelajaran. Dia berjanji akan mengahwini pasangannya bila dia kembali. Tetapi terhalang setelah dia temui perenpuan lain.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Hijrah Jannah - EP 39
programme.desc: Hubungan Jannah dan Puan Sri Rafidah semakin baik. Rasa terganggu dengan perubahan Zakri, Jannah berjumpa dengan Zarina dan memintanya untuk menasihati Zakri.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 15
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 4
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 16
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops - EP 4
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Bunga Hati - EP 12
programme.desc: Seorang gadis miskin berdepan dengan konflik antara ibu yang membencinya dan abangnya yang cacat serta terperangkap dalam cinta tiga segi antara kekasih pertama dan doktor jutawan.

programme.title: Jongkong
programme.desc: Wan Ibrahim perlu mencari penyelesaian segera untuk melarikan diri daripada pakciknya, Wan Usin, dengan menjual beberapa jongkong emas yang dirompak oleh mereka, dan dia perlu melalui pelbagai cabaran.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 22

programme.title: Raja Pantun - EP 12

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie-
programme.desc: Watch your favourite movies with all the drama and emotion on Sun TV.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This news programme chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Movie contd -
programme.desc: Watch your favourite movies with all the drama and emotion on Sun TV.

programme.title: Chellame Chellame
programme.desc: Separated at birth, twins Kavin and Nila unknowingly meet at school, setting off truths that force their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their forbidden marriage and the painful past that tore their family apart.

programme.title: Annam
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Annam, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father and coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to be her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother and sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This news programme chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Singapenne
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Anandhi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: ETHIRNEECHAL THODARGIRADHU
programme.desc: Urged by her father, Janani is always a high achiever. But her marriage into a patriarchal family dashes her dream of a career. Thus begins Janani's arduous journey towards empowering her family's oppressed women to unleash their power.

programme.title: Malli
programme.desc: Things take a momentous shift when a bold & loving village girl, Malli, crosses paths with a doting father and his 6-year-old daughter who yearns for a mother's love. Join the family's journey through the nuances of love, affection & parenthood.

programme.title: ANANDARAGAM - Serial
programme.desc: Unfortunate events force an ambitious Eashwari and a school dropout Azhagar to tie the knot. Can this odd couple turn their marriage into a happily ever after? Will Eashwari realize her IPS dream amidst life's many hardships?

programme.desc: In a bid to escape her ill-fate, Nila becomes the daughter-in-law of a family with a tainted past. Can she restore their lost hope, or will it shatter hers?

programme.desc: Meena and Muthukumar, both carrying emotional baggage, struggle through challenges in their marriage due to their troubled backgrounds.

programme.desc: Teen girls' medical dreams are dashed by forced marriage to a patriarchal family. She struggles to adapt while clinging to her aspirations.

programme.desc: Set against water scarcity, this film follows three people: Baskar, a desalination hopeful; Archana, his wife; Madan, an influencer. Together they triumph through clever plans.

programme.title: Magale En Marumagale - EP 150
programme.desc: When tragedy strikes Tulasi, she turns to her matriarchal mother-in-law for solace. As the boundaries blur between affection and captivity, how will she cope?

programme.desc: For her father's word, Bairavi ties the knot with Arumugam, while Siva rejects Sindhu's proposal yet ends up marrying her. How will these couples find solace?

programme.desc: Shanmugam reunites with his childhood sweetheart, hires her as a housemaid because she needs work. His wife protests when she learns of the arrangement tonight.

programme.desc: Shakthi an aspiring professor, is coerced into marriage weds Velan to teach him a lesson. Her brother marries Velan's sister for her protection. Shakthi's journey in Velan's patriarchal family.

programme.desc: Kanmani, a talented chef, falls for Anbu, heir to Raj Foods, while her actress friend Vennila also catches his eye. After an unexpected marriage, will Anbu accept Kanmani as his wife?

programme.desc: Executive Class is an award-winning luxury lifestyle and travel programme hosted by veteran broadcast journalist David Celdran.

programme.title: The World Tonight
programme.desc: ANC brings you news updates and breaking news from the Philippines, as well as cultural and religious progamming.

programme.title: Banker After Dark
programme.desc: Stephen Cuunjieng gets up close and personal with various industry leaders for some insightful and entertaining conversations.

programme.title: ANC Presents
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date on the latest domestic and international news as well as information that matters to you, right here on ANC.

programme.title: Metro Home
programme.desc: Get inspiration for your home as we visit different stylish and creative living spaces in the metro!

programme.title: Chasing Flavors
programme.desc: Well-known Kapampangan chef, Chef Claude Tayag, probes the origins of Filipino iconic dishes from region to region, one dish at a time, and will attempt to answer what makes each dish unique and outstanding in its own right.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: Hosted by an all-star cast, It's Showtime is a variety show unlike any other. Watch as people from all over come on stage to showcase their skills and creativity in this one-of-a-kind talent show full of fun and prizes.

programme.title: Ngayon At Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva fights to reclaim her place in the wealthy Cortes family while searching for the truth about her identity. Fate brings her together with Inno, and their love story endures family secrets, rivalry and tragedy as they discover the real meaning of forgiveness and redemption.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: FPJ's Batang Quiapo

programme.title: Peuples Des Sommets - EP 3
programme.desc: Guillaume sets off to meet the inhabitants of Mala Crna Gora, a tiny village perched in the Durmitor mountains in the heart of Montenegro. Isolated from the rest of the world, the villagers there perpetuate an ancestral way of life, punctuated by the seasons, manual labour, and the bond with the land.

programme.title: Bijoux : Eclats De Reves - EP 2
programme.desc: How do you design a piece of jewellery? Hear from creators, artisans and artistic directors from major houses.

programme.title: OPJ - EP 11
programme.desc: The body of Helene Bertillon, director of a water sports base, is found in the Saint-Paul pond nature reserve. As the investigation is conducted jointly by the police and the gendarmerie, tensions rise quickly.

programme.title: OPJ - EP 12
programme.desc: Another body is discovered and all eyes turn to the victim's phone, which may contain valuable clues.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 1
programme.desc: Christel Sadde creates moving sculptures. A trained graphic designer inspired by geometric abstraction and kinetic art, she has been exploring for over twenty years the poetic and aerial lightness of form.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Temps Present
programme.desc: 'Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: As always, carried by the vision of Magloire Delcros-Varaud, "Rassemblance" delves even further into the deconstruction of prejudices and received ideas about immigration, handicap, sexuality, religion... let's go and meet people with stories that are as inspiring as they are enriching.

programme.title: C'est Du Belge
programme.desc: In the company of Gerald Watelet, focus on the best ambassadors of Belgian culture and heritage, on the behind-the-scenes of unmissable events and portraits of personalities making the news.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Escapades En Suisse Italienne - EP 3
programme.desc: A day's walk along the banks of the Ceresio, with a visit to the historic centre of Carona, the church of Santa Maria d'Ongero and the San Grato park.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 57
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 10
programme.desc: Aged 23, Valeriia Novikova left Russia to escape a restrictive society. She arrived in France thanks to an 'Au Pair' programme, decided to study languages and then did her 'coming out'. The young woman has created strong links with her host family and her community.

programme.title: Ils Vecurent Heureux - EP 7
programme.desc: Out of boredom, Eve let herself be tempted by an apple, without realizing what it would cause. Since then, Adam resents her because it turned his life upside down.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine - EP 57
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Escapades En Suisse Italienne - EP 3
programme.desc: A day's walk along the banks of the Ceresio, with a visit to the historic centre of Carona, the church of Santa Maria d'Ongero and the San Grato park.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 11
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 22
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek - EP 9
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Quiquoi - EP 52
programme.desc: Olive, Petole, Boulard, Mixo, Raoul and Pamela make up a full-of-fun gang known as the Quiquoi. Together they ask a host of existential questions, using drawings to find the answers. In their own quirky way, they love nothing better than creating surrealist worlds where everything becomes possible.

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 25
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 26
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region
programme.desc: Travels to discover the regions of France. Through these territories, the investigations come as close as possible to the issues of today's society.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Chien De La Casse
programme.desc: Childhood friends Dog, the quiet one, and Mirales, the flamboyant one, ward off boredom by roaming the streets in their little village in the south of France. One day, Elsa moves into the village. Dog falls in love and Mirales can't stand it.

programme.title: Sami La Fugue
programme.desc: A winter in Franche-Comte. Sami, committed to a psychiatric hospital, receives a visit from his mother and younger sister, who tell him that their mare has died. The news sends everything reeling...

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 17
programme.desc: Loic has got it into his head that it would be a good idea to introduce Rosalie's sister to Nick, but the latter is dead against it. Pascale and Lea, however, think it's a great suggestion.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 18
programme.desc: Nick has to decide what he wants to do when he's older and contacts Andy to find out more about being an artist. He discovers him in a terrible state after his break-up with Pascale.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 19
programme.desc: Fred can't take part in the school talent show because she'd left it too late and the inscriptions have closed. Pascale is outraged and contacts the headmaster.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 20
programme.desc: Loic learns that Rosalie's father wants to meet him but he's too stressed-out to agree. When he goes to the pizzeria to ask Nick for his advice who should he cross but his step-father...

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 20
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Fontainebleau, the Musee des Peintres de Barbizon traces the history of Impressionism. A self-taught chef turned Michelin-starred chef, Guy Martin looks back on his gastronomic career at the Grand Vefour. Time travel with Chemena Kamali, at the helm of Chloe. The art of straw marquetry with Stephanie Trolez.

programme.title: Les Amants De Brasmort
programme.desc: Brasmort is a barge cemetery. This is where Jean, a down-and-out sailor, and Monique, the daughter of a very rich shipowner, declare their love for each other. But they will need courage to face up to all that separates them.

programme.title: Ya Benti
programme.desc: Sabrina, lesbian, is about to marry Younes, her childhood friend, who is also gay. A marriage that suits both of them because it reassures and delights their families. But on the eve of the ceremony, Sabrina begins to have doubts.

programme.title: Fraiche
programme.desc: At the age of 58 and at the head of a literary programme on the radio, Anne leads a settled and peaceful family life. Until the day she attacks a young woman with incredible violence simply because she offers Anne her seat on the metro.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 4
programme.desc: Christophe Lepetit, baker and restaurateur in Bayeux, created a short supply chain for flour production. He partnered with a farmer in Ryes to install a mill on his farm, right next to the field where the wheat grows. The flour is then sold to local artisans.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Nos Amis Sauvages - EP 2
programme.desc: The immense bearded vulture has returned to the Alps. Good news, as this natural cleaner rids the mountains of the carcasses of ibex or sheep. Let's watch its spectacular flight at the foot of one of its nests near Martigny...

programme.title: A Travers Champs - EP 5
programme.desc: While we are rethinking our relationships with towns and our buying habits, urban farming is becoming part of the conversation. A movement on the rise uniting community gardens, individuals, large producers and urban farming cooperatives.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 3
programme.desc: Near Louviers, in Eure, two schoolteachers fulfilled their dream: launching an educational farm. They welcome animals and maintain a large organic vegetable garden, around which they organize workshops.

programme.title: Ils Vecurent Heureux - EP 8
programme.desc: Snow White and the Prince got married even though they don't really know each other at all...

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: Slam

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie - EP 12

Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 23
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek - EP 10
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 1
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 27
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! programme.title: Movie - Citizen
programme.desc: Abdulla, a mechanic, kidnaps three prominent government officials. Sarojini is a CBI officer who investigates this matter and tries to piece together the clues left behind by the kidnapper.

programme.title: Movie - Vanayutham
programme.desc: The infamous forest brigand Veerappan smuggles sandalwood and ivory, kills elephants, and murders innocent people incessantly. Finally, the police set up a task force to catch him and his gang.

programme.title: Movie - Veluthukattu
programme.desc: Kathir decides to change his wayward lifestyle to marry Arukkani and moves to the city. He returns home as a successful restaurant owner but tragedy strikes in Arukkani's life.

programme.title: Movie - Vinayaka
programme.desc: Karthik, a cheerful man, starts working for a new company in Hyderabad. There, he falls in love with Kalpana. Unfortunately, Kalpana doesn't feel the same for him.

programme.title: Movie - Arpudham
programme.desc: Ashok is a careless man with no respect for hard work. He falls for Priya who rejects him. When he threatens to kill himself, she reminds him that he's a nobody. He decides to make a mark for himself.

programme.title: Movie - Thangamaana Rasa
programme.desc: Chinnakaruppan goes to jail after accidentally killing his brother for cheating him. His son Rasa tries to make peace with his cousin who holds vengeance against his family for killing his father.

programme.title: Movie - Maraivaasi
programme.desc: A billionaire's son returns after his father's death and joins the company as a regular employee in order to nab the people responsible for his father's murder.

programme.title: Movie - Mundhanai Mudichu
programme.desc: Parimalam, a mischievous girl, falls in love with a widower who works as a teacher. She marries him by falsely accusing him of molesting her, but she has to take a drastic step to win his heart.

programme.title: Movie - Viswanathan Ramamurthy
programme.desc: A man moves to the city with his wife, wishing to be a movie director. They bank on his rich friend who lives with his actress wife. A role reversal changes things and a woman tries to woo the aspiring director.

programme.title: Movie - Virudhunagar Sandhippu
programme.desc: A fun-loving student is raised by his college principal and falls in love with a girl, but the girl's father wants to take revenge on the principal who was responsible for putting him behind bars.

programme.desc: A serial killer known to target prostitutes is on the run. Vikram, a policeman, investigates the case and embarks on a mission to track him down.

programme.desc: Ramesh, a devotee of Goddess Renuka, falls for a rich woman Shanta, and marries her. But her relatives ruin their marital lives through black magic to gain their wealth and property.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2009/2010 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 22
programme.desc: We tell the story of a commanding centre-back whose leadership and consistency made him a standout figure in both the Premier League and international football. From his early career in Portugal to his influential spell at Southampton, PL Stories explores how Fonte became a rock in the heart of defence during the club's rise in the top-flight.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League's most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 28
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 24 FEB
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 28
programme.desc: At just 22 years old, Xavi Simons has already experienced more than most do in an entire career. Identified as a generational talent from an early age, Simons graduated from La Masia before moving to PSG, where he played alongside his childhood hero, Neymar. Following spells at PSV and RB Leipzig after his time in the French capital, Simons made the move to Tottenham Hotspur and the Premier League this summer.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 27
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 23 FEB
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 2
programme.desc: Tim Howard spent a decade as Everton's first choice goalkeeper, the club that defined his Premier League career. The American recalls his journey from New Jersey, via Old Trafford, to Goodison Park, and his most memorable moments between the posts.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 28
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.desc: From the depths of League One to becoming a Premier League and European champion, Adam Lallana emerged as one of English football's standout talents of the 2010s. The midfielder recalls his most memorable matches for Southampton and Liverpool.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 11
programme.desc: When Arne Slot guided Liverpool to their 20th League title in his debut season, it marked the beginning of a new era, yet echoed a familiar tradition. Explore the rich legacy of Liverpool's managerial transitions, where through decades of change, one constant endures: the club's remarkable ability to evolve and triumph, through seamless succession.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: We sit down with ex-Premier League referee Howard Webb, to talk about his early days as a South Yorkshire policeman to becoming one of the most respected referees in world football. In this candid interview Webb shares stories of his rise through the Premier League ranks, culminating in the honour of refereeing the 2010 FIFA World Cup Final. Along the way, he shares the challenges, pressures, and defining moments of a career spent making the game's toughest calls on the biggest stages.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 4
programme.desc: Marcelo Bielsa brought Premier League football back to Leeds in 2020, following a 16 year exile from the top flight. Amidst the backdrop of a global pandemic, Bielsa's full-throttle tactics made Leeds the story of the season. Stuart Dallas recalls the highlights.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 21
programme.desc: As far as cult hero's go, few are as beloved as Dimitar Berbatov. In a seven-year Premier League career, the Bulgarian set the league alight with his grace and elegance with the ball at his feet. This week, Berbatov sits down with the Big Interview to discuss his upbringing in Blagoevgrad and making a name for himself first with CSKA Sofia and then Bayer Leverkusen.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 29
programme.desc: Michael Kayode's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. After spending seven years in the Juventus academy, Kayode moved to Gozzano in Serie D. A breakout campaign saw the then 16-year-old play a big part in Gozzano's title win and promotion. His form soon caught the attention of Fiorentina, where he made his Serie A debut and played in back-to-back UEFA Conference League finals.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 26
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the first of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Eden Hazard. A celebrated footballer who lit up the English top-flight during his illustrious career; a winner of multiple domestic and European honours, he became a true legend of the Premier League era. He reflects on his rise to the top, the moments that defined his career, and the immense pride he feels at joining the elite ranks of the Premier League's greatest ever players.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 25
programme.desc: In a career spanning 20 years, Petr Cech established himself as one of the greatest goalkeepers the game has ever seen. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the four-time Premier League champion to reflect on his playing career and the mentality it takes to be a goalkeeper at the very pinnacle of world football. Cech reflects on his journey from Plzen to becoming the only player record 200 clean sheets in the Premier League.

programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 24 FEB
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 1
programme.desc: Once the unsung workhorses of English football, centre-backs have become some of the Premier League's most influential figures. This week, The Art of... sits down with two-time Premier League winner Joleon Lescott to explore how the role has evolved from last-ditch defending to a position that now shapes games, systems and titles. Joleon breaks down some of the key attributes of the role, and examines how the duties of the centre-back have expanded over time.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 29
programme.desc: Michael Kayode's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. After spending seven years in the Juventus academy, Kayode moved to Gozzano in Serie D. A breakout campaign saw the then 16-year-old play a big part in Gozzano's title win and promotion. His form soon caught the attention of Fiorentina, where he made his Serie A debut and played in back-to-back UEFA Conference League finals.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 27
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.desc: Haaland or Salah? Saka or Palmer? Isak or Cunha? Picking your Fantasy team is never easy, but the Fantasy Show is on hand to help FPL Managers with those big decisions.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 28

programme.title: WELCOME TO THE WEEKEND - FRI 27 FEB
programme.desc: As Lunar New Year celebrations continue, Declan Rice and Gabriel learn Chinese traditions and attempt to make dumplings. We spend 4 minutes with Chelsea full-back Malo Gusto who tells us about his rise to the Premier League, while Ellie Collins is live in Bournemouth ahead of Saturday's early match against Sunderland.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2016/2017 season.

programme.title: FANZONE - FRI 27 FEB
programme.desc: This is the show that puts international fans at the heart of the Premier League conversation. We connect with fans from around the world as they share their views on their teams and favourite players.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Rizlen Zouak
programme.desc: This episode features a women's banthamweight championship as Amanda 'Mad Dog' Lino and Rizlen 'The Lioness of the Atlas' Zouak fight their way to Fight of the Night honors. Bonus coverage showcases more striking power with Mzawandile Hlongwa vs. Robert Swanepoel and Steve Nwosu vs. Quinton Rossouw. From EFC 70 in Sibaya Casino, Durbin, South Africa on 26-May-2018.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka 'Tata' (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo 'Thunder' Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 3: Tokyo, Japan - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kyokushin Karate and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Breaking featuring Masters Shihan Yuzo Goda and Shihan Isamu Fukuda.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Shane Mosley
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-unbeaten Saul "Canelo" Alvarez in what might yet be his toughest challenge in his career, as he defends the WBC light middleweight championship against "Sugar" Shane Mosley. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Goeido, Hakuho, Kakuryu and Takayasu from the Haru basho, 2019.

programme.title: Bipolar Rock n' Roller
programme.desc: A raw and unflinching account of Mauro Ranallo's decades-long struggle with Bipolar Affective Disorder. The voice of WWE and Showtime Championship Boxing, Ranallo has called some of the biggest sports events in history - all the while fighting his own epic battles with mental health Follow his journey in this 3-part series, as he combats the stigma behind mental health issues and sheds light on what it's like being at the top of the industry despite seemingly insurmountable odds.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features two-time UFC champion and Hall of Famer Randy "The Natural" Couture and his buddies firing up their motorcycles for a good cause, plus an interview with one of MMA's biggest stars, "Rowdy" Ronda Rousey. We've got another installment of the gun store challenge this time with Thiago Alves, plus we go behind the scenes for a photo shoot with ring girl Arianny Celeste, exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh! S2 - EP 38

programme.title: Dinotrux Supercharged S3 - EP 64

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it "the Kelp way."

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 26

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 11

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: The Dews think a double rainbow is making their powers change, but what they discover is that they are about to graduate to a new level of Dew Dropness, with the newfound ability to float in the air! / When Reed discovers he’s being assigned a family, he runs to tell Athena, only to find Athena and her house are missing! While Eden and Phoebe search for Athena, Reed’s on Dew Drop duty for Athena. After successfully helping Athena's kids, Reed is assigned the family in the apartment below Athena.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Gran's cane and Sandy's bear go missing in the middle of the night, Eep chases down every clue to the first-ever mystery to find the thief.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: Gran is sick of the Croods not listening to her advice and fakes her own death. But, when the Croods don't mourn to her liking, she haunts them/Ahhh! Valley threatens to exile Sandy after a string of bad behavior unless the Croods can get her under control

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 59
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 60
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 77
programme.desc: The riders think they have discovered the King of Dragons but quickly learn along with the Flyers that the real King of the Dragons lives under Berserker Island

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S3 - EP 78
programme.desc: The riders battle the Flyers at Berserker Island while Hiccup and Dagur search the caves and find a Bewilderbeast egg

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 77

However, he must lose the tail of Canada’s most notorious fugitive tracker, a trained bear cub named Henri. Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 78
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 51
programme.desc: After the events of the Boss Baby 2 film, adult businessman Theodore Templeton is framed for embezzling from his company and forced to revert back to his old Boss Baby self and crash with his brother Tim. But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3

Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC’s "Worldwide Exchange" delivers essential, actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Morgan Brennan, the program prepares CNBC’s worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action.

programme.title: The Observers

programme.title: Unaginobori LAB: What Makes People Gather (R)
programme.desc: ‘Unaginobori’ is a Japanese idiom that describes a rapid and powerful upward surge-like an eel shooting upward. This program uses a uniquely developed a map to track places where people are gathering with unaginobori momentum, revealing the mystery behind these sudden population spikes. Where people gather, there lies the key to unlocking the story of our times!

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 44
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming

programme.title: Battle ATM
programme.desc: Creating a brand-new interactive ATM that combined with puzzle solving and daily life! Guests can win money by taking three rounds of intellectual challenges from the ATM, turn wisdom into money! Futuristic program scenes with video game clearing concept, where challengers engage in the intellectual competition to switch on the ATM. Those who won goes to the ultimate challenge.

programme.title: Have a nice dream
programme.desc: There's a saying that "You can always get inspired by nature." Five outdoor enthusiasts-a cook, an athlete, a photographer, and two ecological experts-plan a two-day trip to enjoy the ultimate getaway in Taiwan. They share mysterious secret spots that have yet to be discovered, and places that are hard to access, featuring breathtaking mountain scenes and some of the bluest waters in the world. They also educate people on how to preserve Taiwan's beautiful and gifted environment.

programme.title: Discover New Taiwan Step By Step
programme.desc: The creative production team goes around Taiwan in search of inspiring stories in the country. Get to know more unique individuals and discover the true spirit of Taiwan.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 3
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2751
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.
